MOTION To Vacate Judgt
Off Calendar Apr-06-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

NO Other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

MOTION For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Feb-01-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ken LaMance, Esq. (415) 941-8884 for Defendant and Moving Party Legalmatch, Inc.
Robert N. Edwards, appearing by Court Call, Plaintiff Propria Persona
RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT LEGALMATCH, INC.'S Motion For Reconsideration is DENIED without prejudice. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-21-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ken Lamance, Esq. (415) 946-0884 for Defendant and Moving Party Legalmatch, Inc.
Robert N. Edwards, Plaintiff Propria Persona (Court Call)
RULING:
A R G U E D; Defendant's request for a continuance is DENIED; Defendant's Motion (oral) For Stay Of Enforcement is DENIED. The Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANT LEGALMATCH, INC.'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT: DENIED. Defendant is relying on the wrong statute as the basis for this motion. CCP 1713.4 only applies to judgments entered in other counties, not sister-state judgments. See CCP 1710.10 et seq. Plaintiff withdraws his request for attorney fees. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
